# type

**Instance Property**

The type of sound asset.

## Declaration

```swift
var type: PHASEAsset.AssetType { get }
```

## Discussion

The framework sets the value of this property to the type you pass into [doc://com.apple.phase/documentation/PHASE/PHASEAssetRegistry/registerSoundAsset(url:identifier:assetType:channelLayout:normalizationMode:)].
title: type
